settings.heading: Ordering and delivery
settings.content: Delivery, COD and order confirmation basics for Morganics customers.

settings.question: Do you deliver across Pakistan?
settings.answer: Yes. Morganics offers Pakistan-wide delivery where courier service is available.

settings.question: Do you offer Cash on Delivery?
settings.answer: Yes, Cash on Delivery is available where supported by courier and store settings.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Delivery time depends on your city, courier route and order confirmation. Major cities are usually faster than remote areas.

settings.question: Can I order through WhatsApp?
settings.answer: Yes. You can send product names, quantities and your city on WhatsApp for guidance.

settings.heading: Products
settings.content: Product selection, natural variation and sourcing guidance.

settings.question: Are Morganics products medicines?
settings.answer: No. Morganics products are food, pantry, herbal or traditional ingredients. They are not medicines and do not diagnose, treat, cure or prevent disease.

settings.question: How do I choose the right product?
settings.answer: Start with your routine: snacking, breakfast, tea-time, gifting, summer drinks, cooking or traditional pantry use. You can also contact us for guidance.

settings.question: Are product colors and shapes always the same?
settings.answer: Natural products may vary in shape, size, color and texture. This is normal and does not always indicate a quality issue.

settings.question: Do you sell products not listed on the website?
settings.answer: If a herb, seed, dry fruit or specialty ingredient is not listed, send us the name and quantity. We will check availability.

settings.heading: Storage and safety
settings.content: Basic guidance before using and storing natural pantry products.

settings.question: How should I store dry fruits and nuts?
settings.answer: Keep them sealed in a cool, dry place away from sunlight, heat and moisture. Refrigerate after opening in hot or humid weather if needed.

settings.question: How should I store herbs and botanicals?
settings.answer: Keep them sealed, dry and away from strong odors, moisture and direct sunlight.

settings.question: Are nuts safe for everyone?
settings.answer: Nuts may not suit customers with nut allergies. Avoid products that conflict with your allergy or dietary advice.

settings.question: Should pregnant, nursing or medicated customers use botanicals?
settings.answer: Use herbs, botanicals and specialty ingredients with professional guidance if pregnant, nursing, medicated, allergic or managing a health condition.

settings.heading: Returns and support
settings.content: How Morganics handles damaged parcels, wrong items and bulk requests.

settings.question: What if my parcel is damaged?
settings.answer: Contact support with order details and clear photos of the parcel/product as soon as possible.

settings.question: What if I receive the wrong item?
settings.answer: Contact Morganics support with your order number and product photos. We will review and guide you.

settings.question: Do you offer bulk orders?
settings.answer: Yes. Contact us for corporate gifting, Ramadan/Eid boxes, pantry restocking or custom packs.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.intro: Here are the most common questions customers ask before ordering Morganics products.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
